'''''Raptor''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served under [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] in the [[Battle of Kathol System]].

{{Ship-stub}}
